scripts.check: node --check scripts/legal-text-utils.mjs && node --check scripts/search-utils.mjs && node --check scripts/analytics-utils.mjs && node --check scripts/serve-search-api.mjs && node --check scripts/normalize-edrsr.mjs && node --check scripts/enrich-edrsr-text.mjs && node --check scripts/search-sample.mjs && node --check scripts/analyze-decisions.mjs && node --check scripts/import-jsonl-to-supabase.mjs && node --check scripts/build-cloudflare-pages.mjs && node --check assets/precedent-search.js && node --check functions/_supabase-proxy.js && node --check functions/health.js && node --check functions/api/search.js && node --check functions/api/analyze.js && node --check functions/api/decisions/[decision_id].js
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build:pages && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name codex-sud
scripts.dev:pages: npm run build:pages && npx wrangler pages dev dist
